Query.SQL: SELECT CO.CO_NUMBER AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER" , 'CO' AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE" , CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "C.COURT_CODE" , CT.NAME AS "C.COURT_NAME" , 0 AS "C.NO_EVENTS" , NULL AS "C.CASE_NUMBER" , NULL AS "C.CASE_STATUS" , NULL AS "C.WARRANT_TYPE" , NULL AS "C.PRE_ISSUE_BALANCE" , NULL AS "C.DEBT" , NULL AS "C.WARRANT_EXECUTING_COURT" , NULL AS "C.WARRANT_ISSUING_COURT" , CO.CO_TYPE AS "C.CO_TYPE" FROM CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO , COURTS CT WHERE CO.CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND CT.CODE = CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE

SELECT CO.DEBTOR_NAME AS "C.PARTY_NAME" , 'DEBTOR' AS "C.PARTY_ROLE" , NULL AS "C.PARTY_NUMBER" , P.DX_NUMBER AS "C.DX_NUMBER" , P.PARTY_ID AS "C.PARTY_ID" , NULL AS "C.PAYEE_FLAG" , CP.CODE AS "C.PARTY_CODE" FROM CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO , PARTIES P , GIVEN_ADDRESSES G , CODED_PARTIES CP WHERE CO.CO_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND G.CO_NUMBER (+) = CO.CO_NUMBER AND G.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE (+) = 'CO DEBTOR' AND G.VALID_TO IS NULL AND P.PARTY_ID (+) = G.PARTY_ID AND CP.PARTY_ID (+) = G.PARTY_ID UNION SELECT P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "C.PARTY_NAME" , 'EMPLOYER' AS "C.PARTY_ROLE" , NULL AS "C.PARTY_NUMBER" , P.DX_NUMBER AS "C.DX_NUMBER" , P.PARTY_ID AS "C.PARTY_ID" , NULL AS "C.PAYEE_FLAG" , CP.CODE AS "C.PARTY_CODE" FROM CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO , PARTIES P , GIVEN_ADDRESSES G , CODED_PARTIES CP WHERE CO.CO_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND G.CO_NUMBER = CO.CO_NUMBER AND G.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CO EMPLOYER' AND G.VALID_TO IS NULL AND P.PARTY_ID = G.PARTY_ID AND P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME IS NOT NULL AND CP.PARTY_ID (+) = P.PARTY_ID
ORDER BY "C.PARTY_ROLE" DESC

SELECT G.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR1" , G.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR2" , G.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR3" , G.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR4" , G.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR5" , G.POSTCODE AS "C.PARTY_POSTCODE" , G.REFERENCE AS "C.REFERENCE" FROM GIVEN_ADDRESSES G WHERE G.CO_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND G.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE LIKE '%' || ${C.PARTY_ROLE} AND G.VALID_TO IS NULL

SELECT W.WARRANT_ID AS "C.WARRANT_ID" FROM WARRANTS W WHERE ${C.CO_TYPE} = 'AO' AND W.CO_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND W.WARRANT_ID NOT IN ( SELECT WR.WARRANT_ID FROM RETURN_CODES RC , WARRANT_RETURNS WR WHERE WR.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' AND RC.RETURN_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE AND RC.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = WR.RETURN_CODE_COURT_CODE AND RC.RETURN_TYPE = 'F' )

SELECT 'LIVE' AS "C.CO_INFO" FROM CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO WHERE CO.CO_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND ( CO.CO_STATUS = 'LIVE' OR CO.CO_STATUS = 'DEBTR PAYNG' ) UNION SELECT 'NOT LIVE' AS "C.CO_INFO" FROM CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO WHERE CO.CO_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND ( CO.CO_STATUS IS NULL OR ( CO.CO_STATUS != 'LIVE' AND CO.CO_STATUS != 'DEBTR PAYNG' ) )

SELECT COALESCE( ( SELECT SUM(AD.DEBT_AMOUNT_ALLOWED) FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND AD.DEBT_STATUS IN ('LIVE', 'SCHEDULE2', 'PAID') ), 0 ) + COALESCE(CO.FEE_AMOUNT, 0) - COALESCE( ( SELECT SUM(PY.AMOUNT) FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.SUBJECT_NO = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND PY.RD_DATE IS NULL AND PY.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' ), 0 ) AS "C.BALANCE" FROM CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO WHERE CO.CO_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER}

SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') AS "C.MONEY_IN_COURT" FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.SUBJECT_NO = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND PY.PAYMENT_FOR IN ('CO', 'AO/CAEO') AND PY.PASSTHROUGH = 'N' AND PY.RD_DATE IS NULL AND PY.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' AND PY.PAYOUT_DATE IS NULL
